suggestions.issue_description: No skip-navigation link found. Keyboard users must tab through all navigation items to reach main content.
suggestions.fixed_html: Skip to main content ...
suggestions.explanation: Add a skip-navigation link so keyboard users can bypass repetitive navigation.

suggestions.issue_description: Only 3/12 interactive elements are reachable via Tab key. 9 elements may be keyboard-inaccessible.
suggestions.fixed_html: Fix: Ensure all interactive elements are focusable. Use native HTML elements (button, a) or add tabindex='0' and keyboard event handlers.
suggestions.explanation: Only 3/12 interactive elements are reachable via Tab key. 9 elements may be keyboard-inaccessible.

suggestions.issue_description: No <h1> heading found. Screen readers rely on headings to convey page structure.
suggestions.fixed_html: Fix: Add a single <h1> element describing the main page purpose.
suggestions.explanation: No <h1> heading found. Screen readers rely on headings to convey page structure.

suggestions.issue_description: No <nav> landmark found. Navigation regions should be identified for assistive technology.
suggestions.fixed_html: Fix: Wrap navigation links in a <nav> element with aria-label if multiple navs exist.
suggestions.explanation: No <nav> landmark found. Navigation regions should be identified for assistive technology.

suggestions.issue_description: 6 form input(s) have no associated label.
suggestions.explanation: Associate a <label> with the input using the for/id pattern.

suggestions.issue_description: Page uses animations but does not respect prefers-reduced-motion media query.
suggestions.fixed_html: Fix: Add @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { * { animation: none !important; transition: none !important; } }
suggestions.explanation: Page uses animations but does not respect prefers-reduced-motion media query.

suggestions.issue_description: Page does not declare a language. Screen readers need lang attribute to determine pronunciation.
suggestions.explanation: Declare the page language so screen readers use correct pronunciation.
